case_title: REGINA LOUISE MILLER VS. BALLAST INVESTMENTS

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE: $40.00 SERVED SEP-09-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BALLAST INVESTMENTS
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) VERONICA LOPEZ, ASSISTANT PROPERTY MANAGER FILED BY DEFENDANT BALLAST INVESTMENTS

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-04-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO NOV-09-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF REGINA LOUISE MILLER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BALLAST INVESTMENTS REPRESENTED BY VERONICA LOPEZ, ASSIOSTANT PROPERTY MANAGER AND ANGEL POLI, SENIOR PROPERTY MANAGER ARE PRESENT. VERONICA LPEZ PROVIDES TESTIMONY ON BEHALF OF DEFENDANT. SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IS REACHED IN THE AMOUNT OF $1090.00 PROGRESS REPORT DATE IS SET. NO APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED IF PAYMENT IS MADE AS AGREED. IF NO PAYMENT IS RECEIVED, AN APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AND JUDGMENT WILL BE ISSUED. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MILLER, REGINA LOUISE AS TO DEFENDANT BALLAST INVESTMENTS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-04-2021 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REMARK: RETURN MAIL RECD 10/14/21. CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO BALLAST INVESTMENTS-VACANT/UNABLE TO FORWARD
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) ANGEL POLI, SENIOR PROPERTY MANAGER FILED BY DEFENDANT BALLAST INVESTMENTS
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED.(506)
